TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Swasiq, title = Swasiq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Swasiq} }

S.FORM: alang Swasiq ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 92 buwan, 340 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 290 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Swasiq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Swasiq hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Swasiq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Swasiq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Swasiq hya' ga Tabilas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Swasiq ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 92 buwan, 340 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 85% kyan ku 290 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 15% kyan ku 50 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 80%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, saySiyat 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Swasiq hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Swasiq hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Swasiq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Swasiq hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Swasiq hya' ga Tabilas. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕwas~ɕiq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕwas~ɕiq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕwas~ɕiq ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕiq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕwas~ɕiq ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕwas~ɕiq ħjaʔ ɣa taβilas~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
